channel.title: Yangsiyu LU, Chenglin LI on EICP-LAB
channel.description: Recent content in Yangsiyu LU, Chenglin LI on EICP-LAB

item.title: WCERE
item.description: Professor Yangsiyu Lu and PhD student Chenglin Li attended the World Congress of Environmental and Resource Economists (WCERE) in Carcavelos (Portugal) from June 29 to July 03.
